package rulecoverage

func PositiveMiddlewareMutatesDomainModelState() string {
    ruleID := "middleware_mutates_domain_model_state"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Middleware that writes business entities or persistence models as a side effect of request plumbing."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
